contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: Credentialing GAS never-downgrade guard deployed live — clasp creds recovered, both deployments refreshed, guard verified in production
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/333
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/334
  
  Details:
  Completed the deploy that was blocked on clasp auth: Gary pointed at the account-specific credential files (~/.clasprc-gary.json / ~/.clasprc-admin.json — the active ~/.clasprc.json slot had been reset empty on Jun 3); activated the gary copy, clasp-pulled the full credentialing project (1Dj3-) into its tokenomics mirror, confirmed zero drift between deployed HEAD and the reference parser (eliminating code-drift as the historical payload-failure cause — stale pinned-deployment code remains the explanation), synced the never-downgrade patch, bumped Version.gs per convention, clasp push, and refreshed BOTH pinned deployments in place (anon @11, older @12) so every caller gets the current parser plus guard. Reinstalled the 10-minute processing trigger via the anonymous endpoint. Production smoke test: reprocessCredentialingRow on the Jun 5 oracle event recommitted with payload extracted (436 chars, hex 50→64) while PRESERVING the backfilled ?reading=&cast= permalink and the original signature — the guard works live, and the payload-capture path is proven for future events. Canonical Version.gs changelog updated via tokenomics PR. PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/333 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/334
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 75.00
